items.text:
うんこがきれいにこぼれた。


学習ポイント: 「うんこ」は人の排泄物の一つであり、通常は汚いと表現されます。しかし、この文では、「うんこ」を清潔な状態で使用しています。


英訳: Dung was accidentally spilled clean.

items.image_prompt: Draw exactly the situation described by the Japanese sentence below. Use the sentence itself as the source of truth for who appears, what they do, what object is important, and what kind of scene it is. Do not use the study point, translation, or any extra explanation as image content. Do not add unrelated people, food, animals, buildings, decorations, letters, captions, speech bubbles, watermark, or logo. Keep the composition simple and make one still image that directly visualizes the sentence. Japanese sentence: うんこがきれいにこぼれた。 Ignore these extra feed fields if they are present after the sentence: study notes, learning points, translations, labels, metadata.
items.image_negative: photorealistic, text, watermark, logo, low quality, blurry, underexposed, too dark
